{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Gatekeeper
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Gatekeeper]] is a role [[Shadow Ark]] seeks to find to begin integrating planets into his internal system.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17">''The Knight'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Gatekeeper]] of [[Shadow Ark]] must have the power to defend those they protect and be a champion of his inhabitants.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
